info.description: Generated API contract for frontend/backend synchronization.
info.title: Prime Market Backend API

parameters.description: Canonical multi-value status filter. Supports repeated `status` params and comma-separated values in a single parameter.
parameters.name: status

parameters.description: Zero-based page index (0..N)
parameters.name: page

parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned
parameters.name: size

parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.
parameters.name: sort

parameters.description: Canonical multi-value status filter. Supports repeated `status` params and comma-separated values in a single parameter.
parameters.name: status

parameters.description: Zero-based page index (0..N)
parameters.name: page

parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned
parameters.name: size

parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.
parameters.name: sort

get.description: Supports the canonical multi-value `status` filter plus standard pageable query params `page`, `size`, and `sort`. For multiple statuses use repeated `status` params or a single comma-separated value. `statuses` and `currency_code` are not supported.

parameters.description: Canonical multi-value status filter. Supports repeated `status` params and comma-separated values in a single parameter.
parameters.name: status

parameters.description: Zero-based page index (0..N)
parameters.name: page

parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned
parameters.name: size

parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.
parameters.name: sort

parameters.description: Canonical single-value request status. Omit the parameter to return requests of all statuses.
parameters.name: status

parameters.description: Zero-based page index (0..N)
parameters.name: page

parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned
parameters.name: size

parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.
parameters.name: sort

get.description: `gameSlug`, `categorySlug`, `intent`, and `viewerCurrencyCode` are runtime-required even though the controller keeps them optional to preserve the current validation flow.

parameters.description: Required game slug.
parameters.name: gameSlug

parameters.description: Required category slug.
parameters.name: categorySlug

parameters.description: Requested market intent.
parameters.name: intent

parameters.description: Viewer currency code used for display price.
parameters.name: viewerCurrencyCode

parameters.description: Zero-based page number.
parameters.name: page

parameters.description: Page size. Defaults to 20 when omitted.
parameters.name: size

parameters.description: Explicit sort order. When omitted, backend uses `price_asc` for `buy` and `price_desc` for `sell`.
parameters.name: sort

get.description: `intent` and `viewerCurrencyCode` are runtime-required and affect both trade direction and display price.

parameters.description: Requested market intent.
parameters.name: intent

parameters.description: Viewer currency code used for display price.
parameters.name: viewerCurrencyCode

parameters.description: Zero-based page index (0..N)
parameters.name: page

parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned
parameters.name: size

parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.
parameters.name: sort

get.description: Opens a user-level Server-Sent Events stream for new notifications and unread count updates.

parameters.description: Optional multi-value wallet currency filter.
parameters.name: currency

parameters.description: Optional multi-value transaction type filter.
parameters.name: type

parameters.description: Zero-based page index (0..N)
parameters.name: page

parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned
parameters.name: size

parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.
parameters.name: sort

get.description: Supports only the canonical single-value `status` filter plus standard pageable query params `page`, `size`, and `sort`. `statuses` and `currency_code` filters are not supported by this endpoint.

parameters.description: Canonical single-value request status. Omit the parameter to return requests of all statuses.
parameters.name: status

parameters.description: Zero-based page index (0..N)
parameters.name: page

parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned
parameters.name: size

parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.
parameters.name: sort

servers.description: Relative to the current backend base URL
